display.purpose: Hero headlines and major match-list copy only.

headline.purpose: Winner statements, score centers, and prediction declarations.

title.purpose: Section intros and dashboard section headers.

body.purpose: Reasoning, market descriptions, chat messages, metadata, and insight summaries.

label.purpose: Uppercase labels, status chips, nav labels, table headers, and compact metadata.

metric.purpose: Probabilities, confidence values, edge values, scores, and numeric outcomes.

shadows.name: panel-rest
shadows.purpose: Dashboard panels, live rail, and match stage containers.

shadows.name: flag-lift
shadows.purpose: Flag frames and important media in match hero surfaces.

shadows.name: google-control-lift
shadows.purpose: Third-party auth button in the sticky header.

motion.name: state-fast
motion.purpose: Hover, focus, border, and background state changes.

motion.name: shell-shift
motion.purpose: App shell column changes, overlay blur, and page loading transitions.

motion.name: spin
motion.purpose: Status spinner and loading logo ring only.

components.name: Primary AI Button
components.description: Square-ended product action for AI send and high-intent dashboard actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-height: 44px; padding: 0 12px; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 8px; background: var(--color-ai-accent, #9a5cff); color: var(--color-text-primary, #f5f8ff); font: 950 12px/1.2 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 160ms ease, border-color 160ms ease, transform 160ms ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #7c3aed; color: #fff; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(52, 131, 255, 0.5); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { cursor: not-allowed; opacity: 0.58; transform: none; }

components.name: Google Auth Button
components.description: Third-party sign-in control in the sticky header.
components.css: .ds-google-button { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; min-height: 44px; padding: 0 16px 0 12px; border: 1px solid rgba(139,154,176,0.22); border-radius: 999px; background: rgba(245,248,255,0.96); color: #1f2937; font: 900 13px/1 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; white-space: nowrap; box-shadow: 0 10px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.18); transition: border-color 160ms ease, background-color 160ms ease, transform 160ms ease; } .ds-google-button:hover { border-color: rgba(111,166,255,0.5); background: #fff; transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-google-button:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(52,131,255,0.5); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-google-mark { display: grid; width: 22px; height: 22px; place-items: center; border: 1px solid rgba(139,154,176,0.22); border-radius: 50%; background: #fff; color: #4285f4; font-weight: 950; }

components.name: Search Field
components.description: Toolbar search input for match discovery.
components.css: .ds-search { display: flex; min-width: 0; min-height: 44px; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 0 12px; border: 1px solid rgba(153,183,230,0.18); border-radius: 10px; background: rgba(8,17,31,0.82); color: var(--color-text-muted, #718096); } .ds-search:focus-within { outline: 2px solid rgba(52,131,255,0.5); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-search input { width: 100%; min-width: 0; min-height: 44px; border: 0; outline: 0; background: transparent; color: var(--color-text-primary, #f5f8ff); font: 750 14px/1.5 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-search input::placeholder { color: var(--color-text-muted, #718096); }

components.name: Dashboard Panel
components.description: Default analytical panel for winner, probability, reasoning, movement, and live rail surfaces.
components.html:
AI prediction

Live

Brazil has the strongest current win probability because attacking metrics moved up in the last update.
components.css: .ds-panel { display: grid; gap: 16px; padding: 20px; border: 1px solid var(--color-border, #20324c); border-radius: 16px; background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(28,49,78,0.64), rgba(8,17,31,0.94)), var(--color-card, #0a1526); color: var(--color-text-primary, #f5f8ff); box-shadow: 0 8px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.12); } .ds-panel-header { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 12px; } .ds-panel h2 { margin: 0; color: var(--color-text-primary, #f5f8ff); font: 950 15px/1.25 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-panel span { min-height: 27px; padding: 6px 12px; border: 1px solid rgba(32,230,107,0.24); border-radius: 999px; background: rgba(32,230,107,0.08); color: var(--color-success, #20e66b); font: 950 11px/1.2 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-panel p { margin: 0; color: var(--color-text-secondary, #aebbd0); font: 400 14px/1.65 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; }

components.name: Market Card
components.description: Clickable market opportunity card with risk, probability, and signal summary.
components.css: .ds-market-card { display: grid; gap: 12px; min-height: 172px; width: 100%; padding: 16px; border: 1px solid var(--color-border, #20324c); border-radius: 10px; background: var(--color-bg-secondary, #08111f); color: inherit; cursor: pointer; text-align: left; transition: border-color 160ms ease, background-color 160ms ease, transform 160ms ease; } .ds-market-card:hover { border-color: var(--color-border-strong, #3a5276); background: var(--color-card-hover, #0f2138); } .ds-market-card:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(52,131,255,0.5); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-market-card > div { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; justify-content: space-between; gap: 12px; } .ds-market-card strong { color: var(--color-text-primary, #f5f8ff); font: 700 15px/1.3 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-market-card p { margin: 0; color: var(--color-text-secondary, #aebbd0); font: 400 14px/1.4 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-market-card b { color: var(--color-text-primary, #f5f8ff); font: 800 28px/1 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-risk { padding: 4px 8px; border-radius: 999px; background: rgba(32,230,107,0.12); color: var(--color-success, #20e66b); font: 800 11px/1 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; text-transform: uppercase; }

components.name: Live Badge
components.description: Compact status badge for provider state and real-time model updates.
components.css: .ds-live-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; min-height: 27px; padding: 0 12px; border: 1px solid rgba(32,230,107,0.24); border-radius: 999px; background: rgba(32,230,107,0.08); color: var(--color-success, #20e66b); font: 950 11px/1.2 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-live-badge[data-status='provider_error'] { border-color: rgba(255,138,31,0.28); background: rgba(255,138,31,0.1); color: #ffd98d; } .ds-live-badge[data-status='unmapped'] { border-color: rgba(52,131,255,0.28); background: rgba(52,131,255,0.1); color: #c8dcff; }

components.name: Sidebar Nav Item
components.description: Left-panel navigation row with icon cell, active state, and 44px-plus touch target.
components.html: Predictions
components.css: .ds-nav-item { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 34px minmax(0,1fr); align-items: center; gap: 8px; min-height: 46px; padding: 4px 8px 4px 4px; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 8px; color: var(--color-text-secondary, #aebbd0); font: 850 14px/1.2 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; text-decoration: none; transition: border-color 160ms ease, background-color 160ms ease, color 160ms ease; } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: rgba(153,183,230,0.08); color: var(--color-text-primary, #f5f8ff); } .ds-nav-item:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(52,131,255,0.5); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-nav-item.ds-active { border-color: rgba(52,131,255,0.34); background: rgba(52,131,255,0.13); color: var(--color-text-primary, #f5f8ff); } .ds-nav-icon { display: grid; width: 32px; height: 32px; place-items: center; border-radius: 8px; background: rgba(153,183,230,0.08); color: currentColor; }

components.name: Probability Row
components.description: Outcome label, progress track, and heavy percentage value.
components.css: .ds-prob-row { display: grid; grid-template-columns: minmax(0,0.9fr) minmax(72px,1fr) minmax(42px,auto); align-items: center; gap: 12px; } .ds-prob-row span { min-width: 0; color: var(--color-text-primary, #f5f8ff); font: 650 16px/1.2 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; overflow-wrap: anywhere; } .ds-prob-row i { display: block; height: 6px; overflow: hidden; border-radius: 999px; background: rgba(139,154,176,0.22); } .ds-prob-row b { display: block; width: var(--bar-value); height: 100%; border-radius: inherit; background: var(--color-success, #20e66b); } .ds-prob-row strong { color: var(--color-text-primary, #f5f8ff); font: 950 20px/1 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; text-align: right; }

narrative.overview: Worldian is a dark, premium sports intelligence product for time-sensitive football prediction decisions. The interface should feel like an AI reasoning desk: immediate winner signal first, then confidence, model rationale, probability movement, and market opportunities. It is not a sportsbook, not a trading terminal, and not a generic analytics dashboard.
keyCharacteristics: Dark navy analytical canvas with restrained accent usage.
Prediction first, reasoning second, market detail third.
Compact panels with 8-16px radii and subtle tonal gradients.
Semantic state colors that never carry meaning alone.
44px minimum touch targets on buttons, nav items, inputs, and mobile controls.
Responsive structure: side navigation collapses, data tables become stacked cards, and live rails stop being sticky on narrow viewports.

rules.name: The Desk-First Rule
rules.body: Every screen must make the current AI opinion legible before exposing secondary analytics. If a user cannot identify the likely outcome and confidence within five seconds, the hierarchy is wrong.

rules.name: The Accent Means State Rule
rules.body: Do not use green, orange, red, blue, or violet as decoration. Each accent must describe state, source, prediction direction, risk, or AI reasoning.

rules.name: The Dark Canvas Rule
rules.body: Keep the primary interface on `colors.bg-primary` and `colors.card`. Light surfaces are allowed only for third-party branded controls such as the Google sign-in button.

rules.name: The One Family Rule
rules.body: Do not introduce display, serif, mono, or decorative fonts. Product familiarity matters more than typographic novelty.

rules.name: The Number Weight Rule
rules.body: Probability, confidence, score, and edge values must be heavier than surrounding copy. A weak number is a weak prediction.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: A normal card gets a border and tonal fill before it gets a shadow. If every card floats, the dashboard becomes noisy.

rules.name: The Sticky Layer Rule
rules.body: Sticky header, left panel, and live rail may use blur or fixed top offsets, but they must retain solid borders and readable contrast while content scrolls beneath them.

dos: Do preserve the "Prediction first" hierarchy: match context, likely outcome, confidence, reasoning, markets, movement, live feed, and chat.
Do use the existing token values from `frontend/src/styles/abstracts/_variables.scss` and the CSS variables in `frontend/src/styles/base/_global.scss`.
Do keep primary working surfaces on dark navy with `colors.card`, `colors.bg-secondary`, and `colors.border`.
Do use `colors.ai-accent` specifically for AI reasoning, selected market state, chat send, confidence rings, and model-labeled UI.
Do keep all interactive targets at least 44px high on touch surfaces.
Do keep transitions between 160ms and 220ms, and respect reduced motion.
Do use skeletons, status panels, or progress cards for loading. The current loading overlay is acceptable for blocking analysis states.
Do make probability changes legible with direction, magnitude, cause, and market impact.
Do include text labels alongside color-coded state. Green, orange, red, blue, and violet are never the only carrier of meaning.
Do use real football assets, flags, and brand imagery when a hero or match stage needs emotional context.
donts: Don't make the product feel like sportsbook clutter.
Don't make the product feel like Bloomberg-terminal density.
Don't make the product feel like traditional betting dashboards.
Don't make the product feel like complex quant interfaces.
Don't use decorative SaaS marketing layouts on task screens.
Don't use AI-generated dashboard tropes such as generic identical card grids, weak hierarchy, or ornamental effects that do not support decision-making.
Don't introduce gradient text, thick side-stripe borders, glassmorphism as default, or oversized rounded cards.
Don't add new top-level accent colors without a state role. The palette already has AI, info, success, warning, and danger.
Don't use full-saturation color on inactive surfaces.
Don't hide table meaning on mobile. If a table collapses, every cell still needs a visible label.
Don't use chart vocabulary from betting odds or candlestick trading. Worldian shows probability movement, not trading price action.
Don't place chat, AI feed, or secondary analytics above the winner signal on the main dashboard.
